metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the mambu domain.

children.name: Product Configuration Engine
children.description: Enables teams to model and evolve banking products through configuration rather than code-heavy core changes.

internalModules.title: Rules and Configuration Model
internalModules.description: Defines the configurable policies, thresholds, and business rules for Product Configuration Engine.

internalModules.title: Decision Evaluation Engine
internalModules.description: Executes policy and pricing decisions in real time within Product Configuration Engine.

internalModules.title: Simulation and Override Controls
internalModules.description: Supports testing, exceptions, and operator overrides for Product Configuration Engine.

interfaces.title: Decision API
interfaces.description: API that returns policy, quote, or eligibility outcomes calculated by Product Configuration Engine.

interfaces.title: Configuration Workspace
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing rules, policies, and overrides in Product Configuration Engine.

interfaces.title: Policy Change Events
interfaces.description: Event stream that communicates policy updates and decision outcomes from Product Configuration Engine.

children.name: Modular Domain Architecture
children.description: Provides clear domain boundaries for lending, deposits, payments, and adjacent services so transformation can proceed incrementally.

internalModules.title: Runtime Foundation
internalModules.description: Provides the shared architectural runtime and core engineering foundations behind Modular Domain Architecture.

internalModules.title: Developer Tooling and Templates
internalModules.description: Accelerates implementation, testing, and service creation through Modular Domain Architecture.

internalModules.title: Standards and Release Controls
internalModules.description: Enforces engineering standards, guardrails, and release quality in Modular Domain Architecture.

interfaces.title: Developer Portal
interfaces.description: Interface where engineers discover standards, templates, and capabilities provided by Modular Domain Architecture.

interfaces.title: Automation API
interfaces.description: API used by pipelines and tooling to interact with the platform services behind Modular Domain Architecture.

interfaces.title: Platform Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event interface exposing platform lifecycle and automation signals from Modular Domain Architecture.

children.name: Customer and Account Migration Toolkit
children.description: Supports staged data migration, validation, reconciliation, and cutover controls for large banking portfolios.

internalModules.title: Identity and Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Customer and Account Migration Toolkit.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and Lifecycle Management
internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Customer and Account Migration Toolkit.

internalModules.title: Audit and Compliance Controls
internalModules.description: Records security-relevant actions and compliance evidence produced by Customer and Account Migration Toolkit.

interfaces.title: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for authentication, authorization, or account checks exposed by Customer and Account Migration Toolkit.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Customer and Account Migration Toolkit.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes security and compliance signals from Customer and Account Migration Toolkit.

children.name: Ledger and Accounting Core
children.description: Maintains accurate product-level balances, postings, and accounting events during coexistence and migration.

internalModules.title: Identity and Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Ledger and Accounting Core.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and Lifecycle Management
internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Ledger and Accounting Core.

internalModules.title: Audit and Compliance Controls
internalModules.description: Records security-relevant actions and compliance evidence produced by Ledger and Accounting Core.

interfaces.title: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for authentication, authorization, or account checks exposed by Ledger and Accounting Core.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Ledger and Accounting Core.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes security and compliance signals from Ledger and Accounting Core.

children.name: API Gateway and Integration Layer
children.description: Exposes secure product and account services to channels and partner systems using a reusable integration backbone.

internalModules.title: Contract and Mapping Layer
internalModules.description: Maintains schemas, field mappings, and versioned contracts used by API Gateway and Integration Layer.

internalModules.title: Transformation and Routing Engine
internalModules.description: Transforms messages and routes requests or events through API Gateway and Integration Layer.

internalModules.title: Access and Observability Controls
internalModules.description: Applies authentication, throttling, retry handling, and monitoring for API Gateway and Integration Layer.

interfaces.title: Inbound API
interfaces.description: API entry point used to submit requests or payloads into API Gateway and Integration Layer.

interfaces.title: Outbound Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event or webhook surface used by API Gateway and Integration Layer to publish downstream updates.

interfaces.title: Partner Connector Surface
interfaces.description: Connector interface for external systems exchanging data through API Gateway and Integration Layer.

children.name: Real-time Event Streaming
children.description: Publishes business events so downstream systems can stay synchronized without brittle point-to-point coupling.

internalModules.title: Contract and Mapping Layer
internalModules.description: Maintains schemas, field mappings, and versioned contracts used by Real-time Event Streaming.

internalModules.title: Transformation and Routing Engine
internalModules.description: Transforms messages and routes requests or events through Real-time Event Streaming.

internalModules.title: Access and Observability Controls
internalModules.description: Applies authentication, throttling, retry handling, and monitoring for Real-time Event Streaming.

interfaces.title: Inbound API
interfaces.description: API entry point used to submit requests or payloads into Real-time Event Streaming.

interfaces.title: Outbound Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event or webhook surface used by Real-time Event Streaming to publish downstream updates.

interfaces.title: Partner Connector Surface
interfaces.description: Connector interface for external systems exchanging data through Real-time Event Streaming.

children.name: Compliance Rules and Audit Controls
children.description: Applies policy controls, audit trails, and configurable governance needed for regulated financial operations.

internalModules.title: Identity and Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Compliance Rules and Audit Controls.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and Lifecycle Management
internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Compliance Rules and Audit Controls.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Compliance Rules and Audit Controls.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes security and compliance signals from Compliance Rules and Audit Controls.

children.name: Operational Observability and SLA Monitoring
children.description: Provides production visibility, incident response signals, and service-level evidence required for risk management.

internalModules.title: Signal Ingestion and Processing
internalModules.description: Collects operational and business signals that feed Operational Observability and SLA Monitoring.

internalModules.title: Metrics and Decision Engine
internalModules.description: Calculates insights, KPIs, forecasts, or scores produced by Operational Observability and SLA Monitoring.

internalModules.title: Reporting and Operations Workspace
internalModules.description: Presents actionable views, alerts, and drill-down workflows for Operational Observability and SLA Monitoring.

interfaces.title: Dashboard Interface
interfaces.description: Interactive reporting or control surface that presents insights from Operational Observability and SLA Monitoring.

interfaces.title: Metrics and Query API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving metrics, scores, forecasts, or analytical outputs from Operational Observability and SLA Monitoring.

interfaces.title: Alert and Signal Feed
interfaces.description: Event or notification interface exposing operational signals generated by Operational Observability and SLA Monitoring.

children.name: Deposit Product and Account Lifecycle Management
children.description: Handles account opening, funding, interest, fees, statements, and lifecycle states for deposit propositions.

children.name: Payment Orchestration and Scheme Connectivity
children.description: Coordinates payment workflows and external scheme or processor integrations needed for modern money movement.

internalModules.title: Transaction and Ledger Core
internalModules.description: Records the core financial or commercial transactions handled by Payment Orchestration and Scheme Connectivity.

internalModules.title: Settlement and Reconciliation
internalModules.description: Matches external outcomes, balances, and exceptions flowing through Payment Orchestration and Scheme Connectivity.

internalModules.title: Billing Rules and Controls
internalModules.description: Applies pricing, billing, tax, or financial control logic inside Payment Orchestration and Scheme Connectivity.

interfaces.title: Transaction API
interfaces.description: API surface for submitting or retrieving financial transactions handled by Payment Orchestration and Scheme Connectivity.

interfaces.title: Finance Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: User interface for reconciliation, exception handling, and financial oversight in Payment Orchestration and Scheme Connectivity.

interfaces.title: Settlement and Ledger Events
interfaces.description: Event stream carrying posting, settlement, and status changes from Payment Orchestration and Scheme Connectivity.

children.name: Workflow Automation and Case Management
children.description: Routes operational tasks, approvals, and exceptions so banking operations remain controlled as product volume grows.

internalModules.title: Workflow and State Engine
internalModules.description: Orchestrates the main lifecycle, state transitions, and task flow handled by Workflow Automation and Case Management.

internalModules.title: Capacity and Exception Management
internalModules.description: Manages inventory, reservations, workload, and exception handling inside Workflow Automation and Case Management.

internalModules.title: Operations Console Logic
internalModules.description: Supports operator actions, escalations, and manual interventions required by Workflow Automation and Case Management.

interfaces.title: Workflow API
interfaces.description: API for starting, updating, or querying operational workflows managed by Workflow Automation and Case Management.

interfaces.title: Operator Console
interfaces.description: User interface for task handling, interventions, and operational control within Workflow Automation and Case Management.

interfaces.title: Lifecycle Status Events
interfaces.description: Event stream exposing state changes and exceptions produced by Workflow Automation and Case Management.

children.name: Proposition Bundling and Packaging
children.description: Supports quick creation of reusable product packages aligned to partner types and go-to-market motions.

internalModules.title: Experience Shell and Navigation
internalModules.description: Provides the primary user flow, navigation, and page composition for Proposition Bundling and Packaging.

internalModules.title: Session and Personalization State
internalModules.description: Manages user context, preferences, and personalized behavior within Proposition Bundling and Packaging.

internalModules.title: Content and Interaction Orchestration
internalModules.description: Coordinates the content blocks, tasks, and interaction logic shown by Proposition Bundling and Packaging.

interfaces.title: User Experience Interface
interfaces.description: Primary user-facing interface delivered by Proposition Bundling and Packaging.

interfaces.title: Experience Backend API
interfaces.description: API surface used to assemble state and content for Proposition Bundling and Packaging.

interfaces.title: Interaction Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface capturing user actions and journey signals from Proposition Bundling and Packaging.

children.name: Security, Audit, Compliance, and Resilience
children.description: Keeps platform growth aligned with regulated operating expectations and partner trust requirements.

internalModules.title: Identity and Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Security, Audit, Compliance, and Resilience.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and Lifecycle Management
internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Security, Audit, Compliance, and Resilience.

internalModules.title: Audit and Compliance Controls
internalModules.description: Records security-relevant actions and compliance evidence produced by Security, Audit, Compliance, and Resilience.

interfaces.title: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for authentication, authorization, or account checks exposed by Security, Audit, Compliance, and Resilience.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Security, Audit, Compliance, and Resilience.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes security and compliance signals from Security, Audit, Compliance, and Resilience.

children.name: Ecosystem Demand and Value Intelligence
children.description: Surfaces which partner needs, propositions, and integrations create the most strategic value.

internalModules.title: Signal Ingestion and Processing
internalModules.description: Collects operational and business signals that feed Ecosystem Demand and Value Intelligence.

internalModules.title: Metrics and Decision Engine
internalModules.description: Calculates insights, KPIs, forecasts, or scores produced by Ecosystem Demand and Value Intelligence.

internalModules.title: Reporting and Operations Workspace
internalModules.description: Presents actionable views, alerts, and drill-down workflows for Ecosystem Demand and Value Intelligence.

interfaces.title: Dashboard Interface
interfaces.description: Interactive reporting or control surface that presents insights from Ecosystem Demand and Value Intelligence.

interfaces.title: Metrics and Query API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving metrics, scores, forecasts, or analytical outputs from Ecosystem Demand and Value Intelligence.

interfaces.title: Alert and Signal Feed
interfaces.description: Event or notification interface exposing operational signals generated by Ecosystem Demand and Value Intelligence.
